        D1 - Visible transition matrix

        public static double map_moment​(Matrix D0,
                                Matrix D1,
                                int order)
        Raw moments of the inter-arrival times of a MAP
        Parameters:
        D0 - Hidden transition matrix
        D1 - Visible transition matrix
        order - Moment order, i.e., E[X^order]
        Returns:
        Raw moment

        D1 - Visible transition matrix

        Returns:
